mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_water_workplace ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_water_workplace WHERE workplace_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_water_workplace WHERE workplace_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_water_workplace (workplace_name, region, manager, remark, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{workplaceName}, #{region}, #{manager}, #{remark}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_water_workplace SET workplace_name = #{workplaceName}, region = #{region}, manager = #{manager}, remark = #{remark}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
